title: lathyrus littoralis
intro: Lathyrus littoralis, also known as sea pea, is a perennial flowering plant native to the coastal regions of Europe and Western Asia, characterized by its purple flowers and edible seeds. The seeds of the Lathyrus littoralis plant have been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which can help in alleviating symptoms of various health conditions. The health benefits of consuming Lathyrus littoralis seeds include reducing the risk of cardiovascular diseases, improving digestion, and providing essential nutrients to the body. The seeds can be prepared into herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and powdered extracts, which can be used to harness their medicinal properties and health benefits.
